report.title: Report a bug or suggest an idea
report.description: Tell us what's wrong or what you'd love to see. We'll open it for the maintainer with the details below.
report.fieldScreenHelp: Auto-detected from your current page. Change it if it's about somewhere else.
report.fieldSeverity: How much does it affect you?
report.fieldTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Spell save DC shows the wrong number
report.titleRequired: Add a short summary so we can find it.
report.fieldDescriptionHelp: What happened, what you expected, and the steps to reproduce it. For an idea, describe what you'd like and why.
report.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Steps to reproduce, what you expected, what happened instead…
report.noScreenshot: No screenshot was captured. Your report will still be sent.
report.offlineNote: You're offline. Your report will be saved and sent automatically when you reconnect.
report.submitError: Couldn't send your report: {{message}}. Please try again.
report.errorNoUser: You need to be signed in to send a report.
report.sentBody: Your report is on its way. We're opening it for the maintainer now.
report.queuedBody: You're offline. We'll send your report as soon as you reconnect.
